text.title: Go Concurrency Pattern Examples
text.summary: Leak-safe bounded worker pool and fan-out/fan-in pipeline with context cancellation and error collection.

example.note: ctx.Done() in the worker select. jobs closed by the sender (main). results closed by the WaitGroup closer goroutine.
See templates/pool.go for the full leak-safe Pool implementation with context cancellation and error collection.
example.reference: Leak-safe bounded worker pool with context cancellation and error channel

antipattern.description: Worker pool with `_ = job(ctx)` discarding errors.
antipattern.reason: Silently swallows all job errors; callers have no way to detect failures, leading to silent data loss or corruption.
